name: Quick Lamb Stew (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a 2-1/2 quart casserole.
2. Cover and microwave on high (100 percent) to boiling, for 10 to 12 minutes.
3. Stir the mixture.
4. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
5. Then microwave until the vegetables are tender, stirring every 5 minutes for another 10 to 12 minutes.
